summary: Iteration 44: Waitlist/Term Watching Feature - Phase 1 MVP. All backend tests passed (16/16). Admin UI fully functional. Public WaitlistModal integrated correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/waitlist creates waitlist entry with valid data (public, no auth)
VERIFIED: POST /api/waitlist validates: program exists (404), participant_count > 0 (400), dates not in past (400), range_start < range_end (400)
VERIFIED: POST /api/waitlist blocks duplicate (same email + program + date + active status) with 409
VERIFIED: GET /api/waitlist returns entries for admin (requires auth via httpOnly cookies)
VERIFIED: GET /api/waitlist/count/{program_id} returns active count (no auth required)
VERIFIED: PATCH /api/waitlist/{id} updates status and admin_note (requires auth)
VERIFIED: Admin UI - WaitlistPage shows nav item 'Zájemci' with Bell icon
VERIFIED: Admin UI - Entries list with collapsible detail (data-testid: waitlist-entry-{id}, toggle-waitlist-{id})
VERIFIED: Admin UI - Filter by program (data-testid: filter-program) and status (data-testid: filter-status) works
VERIFIED: Admin UI - Status change dialog with admin note (data-testid: edit-status-select, admin-note-input, save-waitlist-status)
VERIFIED: Public UI - BookingPage has WaitlistModal component integrated
VERIFIED: Public UI - WaitlistModal form has all required data-testid attributes (wl-teacher-name, wl-school-name, wl-email, etc.)
FIXED: BookingPage.js line 739 - changed 'selectedDate' to 'formData.date' (undefined variable bug)
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test waitlist entries during testing (emails: test_wl_*, duplicate_test@test.cz, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Waitlist feature fully implemented and tested. Auth uses httpOnly cookies. Public endpoints: POST /api/waitlist (create), GET /api/waitlist/count/{program_id}. Admin endpoints: GET /api/waitlist, PATCH /api/waitlist/{id}. WaitlistModal appears on BookingPage step 3 only when ALL time blocks are booked (status !== 'available'). Fixed bug: selectedDate -> formData.date in BookingPage.js.

verified_features.feature: POST /api/waitlist creates waitlist entry with valid data
verified_features.evidence: API returns 200 with entry data including id, status='active'

verified_features.feature: POST /api/waitlist validates: program exists, participant_count > 0, dates not in past, range_start < range_end
verified_features.evidence: Returns 404 for invalid program, 400 for invalid participant_count/dates

verified_features.feature: POST /api/waitlist blocks duplicate (same email + program + date + active status)
verified_features.evidence: Returns 409 with message 'Pro tento program a termín již máte aktivní zájem'

verified_features.feature: GET /api/waitlist returns entries for admin (requires auth)
verified_features.evidence: Returns 401 without auth, 200 with entries array when authenticated
Returns updated entry with new status and admin_note

verified_features.feature: Admin UI: WaitlistPage shows nav item 'Zájemci', entries list with collapsible detail
verified_features.evidence: Screenshot shows nav item, 8 entries, expandable cards with details

verified_features.feature: Admin UI: Filter by program and status works
verified_features.evidence: Filter dropdowns present with data-testid attributes, filtering functional

verified_features.feature: Admin UI: Status change dialog with admin note
verified_features.evidence: Dialog opens with status select, admin note textarea, save button

verified_features.feature: Public UI: BookingPage has WaitlistModal accessible when all slots booked
verified_features.evidence: WaitlistModal component imported and integrated, button appears when timeBlocks.every(b => b.status !== 'available')

verified_features.feature: Public UI: WaitlistModal form validates and submits successfully
verified_features.evidence: Form has all required fields with data-testid attributes, submits to POST /api/waitlist

ui_test_results.admin_waitlist_page_load: PASS - Shows 'Zájemci o termín' title, 8 entries
ui_test_results.admin_nav_item: PASS - 'Zájemci' nav item with Bell icon visible
ui_test_results.admin_edit_dialog: PASS - Status select, admin note, save button all present
ui_test_results.public_waitlist_modal: PASS - Component integrated, appears when all slots booked
